title: Add cohort strategy-template priors
summary: F1 pit timing is planned around one-stop/two-stop windows, compound cohorts, and traffic, not just individual tyre age.
rationale: F1 pit timing is planned around one-stop/two-stop windows, compound cohorts, and traffic, not just individual tyre age. Public strategy descriptions emphasize common first-stop windows and undercut/overcut responses around rivals.
implementation_hint: Build smoothed OOF priors by Race, Year, Stint, starting compound, current compound, position band, and normalized race progress: historical stop hazard at this lap, cumulative stop share, cohort median first/second stop lap, and deviation from cohort plan.
expected_effect: Should capture race-specific strategy phases and planned pit waves without hand-tuning compound life thresholds.
risk: High-cardinality priors can leak or overfit unless computed OOF and smoothed; weak for unseen Race_Year combinations.
